title: Social Media Editing
short: Short-form edits built to stop the scroll, increase watch-time, and turn viewers into conversion.
detail: Professional Reels, TikToks, Shorts, on-screen captions, pacing, overlays, text, and color adjustment for creators and brands with footage that needs a stronger finish.
ideal: Brands with existing footage or recurring content needs. Creators who are wasting hours every day editing video footage, instead of growing their business. Creators who want to post more consistently (and grow their following and build their business) but who have a hard time finding the time. Business owners who want accountability to post their content. Creators who want an editor who gets it--their voice, their branding, and their audience. Creators who don't want to have to go through endless edits, just a seamless process with someone who truly understands them.
